news.headline: EMMA ROURKE, DEPUTY NATIONAL STATISTICIAN FOR HEALTH, POPULATION AND METHODS, WILL ACT IN HIS PLACE PENDING LONGER TERM ARRANGEMENTS BEING PUT IN PLACE - UK STATISTICS AUTHORITY STATEMENT
UK STATISTICS AUTHORITY HAS ANNOUNCED THE RESIGNATION OF SIR IAN DIAMOND AS THE UK’S NATIONAL STATISTICIAN.

news.summary: Fortune Minerals Limited, a company listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: FT) and OTCQB (OTCQB: FTMDF), has announced the near completion of metallurgical test work validation for the bismuth circuits at their NICO cobalt-gold-bismuth-copper critical minerals project in Canada. This project, wholly owned by Fortune, is advancing as the Process Design Criteria has been established and provided to Worley Canada Services Ltd. for the engineering of the necessary facilities. Further details can be found on Fortune's website at www.fortuneminerals.com.
news.headline: Fortune Minerals confirms successful bismuth test results for NICO Project in Canada, critical minerals project.

news.summary: Boston Pizza Royalties Income Fund and Boston Pizza International Inc. reported their financial results for the first quarter of 2025 on the Toronto Stock Exchange. Franchise sales for the period were $231.1 million, a 4.1% increase from the same period in the previous year, while same restaurant sales saw a 4.4% increase. Cash flows from operating activities were $9.3 million, up 1.8% from the previous year. Distributable Cash increased by 0.1%, with a payout ratio of 100.2% for the period. The cash balance at the end of the period was $4.6 million. A distribution of $0.115 per unit was declared for the period, payable on May 30, 2025. The Fund's net and comprehensive income was $6.3 million, a decrease from the previous year primarily due to fair value loss and current income tax expenses. The Fund generated distributable cash of $7.3 million, with a payout ratio of 100.2%. Total distributions of $463.1 million have been paid out, including 268 monthly distributions and three special distributions. Visit Benzinga.com for the full story and financial summaries.
news.headline: Boston Pizza Royalties Income Fund reported Q1 results with $231.1 million franchise sales, 4.4% SRS, $6.3M net income, $9.3M cash flow, and $0.115 distribution per unit.

news.summary: Fiera Capital Corporation announced its Q1 2025 financial results, showing end of period AUM at $161.6 billion and average AUM at $164.4 billion. Total revenues were $162,871, with base management fees at $154,542. Net earnings were $1 million and adjusted EBITDA stood at $43,403. The company reported net organic growth of approximately $550 million. The company highlighted the unpredictability of global macro and market environments for the rest of 2025, maintaining a strong position with Private Markets strategies. Fiera Capital reduced its quarterly dividend to 10.8 cents per share for financial flexibility. AUM decreased by $5.5 billion, while Private Markets AUM increased by $1.4 billion. Public Markets AUM saw a decrease.
news.headline: Fiera Capital Q1 2025: AUM $161.6B, Total Revenue $162.9M, Adjusted EBITDA $43.4M. Dividend cut to 10.8 cents per share. Strategic growth initiatives planned.

news.summary: In the initial quarter, a net loss of $33.9 million was recorded, despite achieving an Adjusted EBITDA of $5.7 million. The Asset-Based Lending (ABL) has been expanded from $155 million to $225 million following an extended agreement with a revised expiry in May 2029. On the other hand, the projected range for metallurgical coal sales volume has been lowered to 13...
news.headline: Alpha reported Q1 net loss of $33.9M but positive Adjusted EBITDA of $5.7M. Increased ABL to $225M and revised coal sales volume to 13MT.

news.summary: Recent discoveries have shown that PL9654 and PL9655 could be effective in treating diabetic retinopathy by addressing inflammation, stabilizing blood vessels, and protecting nerves. These compounds work by reducing inflammatory processes, inhibiting the formation of new blood vessels, and maintaining the structure and functionality of the retina. Administered topically, PL9654 and PL9655 offer promising potential in managing diabetic retinopathy by targeting key pathways associated with the condition. The findings suggest that these compounds may provide a comprehensive approach to treating diabetic retinopathy.
news.headline: Promising preclinical data on PL9654 and PL9655 for diabetic retinopathy presented at ARVO 2025 shows potential in inflammation resolution, vascular stabilization, and neuroprotection.

news.summary: A Princeton-based biopharmaceutical company, Soligenix, Inc. (Nasdaq: SNGX), revealed its latest developments on May 9, 2025. Specializing in rare disease treatments, the company is in the late stages of product development.
news.headline: Soligenix reports Q1 2025 financial results, focused on rare diseases. (Nasdaq: SNGX). Jersey-based biopharmaceutical company.

news.summary: In Vancouver, BC, on May 9, 2025, Galiano Gold Inc. announced that its Annual General Meeting of shareholders ("AGM") will take place virtually on Thursday, June 12, 2025, starting at 10:00 am PDT. The Company is listed on both the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX:GAU) and the NYSE American (NYSE American: GAU). Shareholders interested in participating in the meeting are advised to make necessary arrangements.
news.headline: Galiano Gold Inc. to hold virtual AGM on June 12, 2025, at 10:00 am PDT. TSX: GAU, NYSE American: GAU.

news.summary: In New Hartford, NY, PAR Technology Corporation (NYSE: PAR) shared its financial outcomes for the initial quarter concluding on March 31, 2025. The CEO of PAR Technology, Savneet Singh, noted the success of the quarter, attributing it to the realization of their Better Together software concept and the enduring performance of the enterprise food-service sector. The company witnessed robust performance in their Operator and Engagement solutions, showcasing the acquisition of new customers and advancement in both segments.
news.headline: PAR Technology Corp announces Q1 2025 results showing strong growth led by Better Together software, with CEO citing success in enterprise food-service industry.

news.summary: Soho House & Co Inc. (NYSE: SHCO) has reported its first-quarter results for the period ending March 30, 2025. The company highlighted total revenues of $282.9 million, reflecting an 8.0% increase compared to the previous year. Membership revenues also saw significant growth, reaching $112.9 million, a 14.1% year-over-year increase. In-House revenues amounted to $112.4 million, showing a modest 1.9% growth from the previous year. The company's Revenue Per A... metric also showed positive growth.
news.headline: Soho House & Co Inc. reports Q1 2025 results: Revenue $282.9M, 8% YoY growth. Membership revenue $112.9M, up 14.1%.

news.summary: On May 9, 2025, Cognition Therapeutics, Inc. revealed promising preclinical findings at the Association for Research in Vision and Ophthalmology (ARVO). The company, listed as CGTX on the NASDAQ, is focused on developing treatments for neurodegenerative conditions. Their data showed the drug zervimesine (CT1812) may have the ability to safeguard retinal pigment epithelial (RPE) cells from harm in cases of dry age-related macular degeneration (dry AMD). This research highlights the potential of CT1812 in protecting against damage in the specific context of dry AMD.
news.headline: Cognition Therapeutics presents data at ARVO on drug CT1812's potential to protect RPE cells in dry AMD. (Word count: 17)

news.summary: Spectral Medical Inc., a company listed on the TSX under the symbol EDT, operating in the theranostic sector focusing on addressing sepsis and septic shock, disclosed its financial performance for the initial quarter of the year. The announcement was made in Toronto on May 9, 2025, detailing the company's progress and current status.
news.headline: Spectral Medical reports Q1 financial results, TSX: EDT, focusing on theranostic solutions for sepsis and septic shock.

news.summary: PyroGenesis Inc., a leading high-tech company specializing in advanced all-electric plasma processes and sustainable solutions for heavy industry, will be conducting a conference call on May 14, 2025, at 10:00 AM Eastern Time to review its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025. The quarter ended on March 31, 2025. PyroGenesis trades on the TSX under the ticker symbol PYR, on the OTCQX as PYRGF, and on the FRA as 8PY1. This call will also cover updates on the company's advancements and other related news.
news.headline: PyroGenesis to hold conference call on May 14, 2025 at 10AM to discuss first quarter financial results, ending March 31, 2025.

news.summary: On May 9, 2025, in San Francisco, Space and Time, a blockchain supported by Microsoft, was announced as a platform for ZK-proven data. This unique blockchain utilizes zero-knowledge proofs to verify data and has been officially launched on its public, permissionless mainnet. Space and Time aims to provide a secure environment for handling data transactions and dealings.
news.headline: Space and Time, backed by Microsoft, launches mainnet blockchain for ZK-proven data. Live now for data-driven crypto apps.

news.summary: A recent filing with the Luxembourg CSSF reports that Robert Wessman, the Chairman and CEO of Alvotech, has acquired 320,000 shares of the company at ISK 1,255 per share. This transaction took place at the market opening and involved closely associated persons. This update involves insider trading activities by key personnel within the organization.
news.headline: Chairman and CEO of Alvotech acquired 320,000 shares at ISK 1,255 per share - reported to CSSF in Luxembourg.

news.summary: The newly presented data from the SYMMETRY trial at the EASL Congress 2025 show promising results for efruxifermin (EFX) in patients with compensated cirrhosis (F4 fibrosis) due to MASH. The 96-week data indicate a potential benefit of EFX in eliciting fibrosis improvement in these patients. This suggests that EFX could be a valuable treatment option for individuals with compensated cirrhosis, offering hope for improved outcomes in this patient population.
news.headline: Akero Therapeutics reports Phase 2b trial results on efruxifermin (EFX) for cirrhosis treatment. Presentation at EASL Congress 2025.

news.summary: In early May of 2025, Mr. Woo Ying-ming, the Commissioner of the Independent Commission Against Corruption (ICAC) in Hong Kong, wrapped up a week-long official trip to three member states of the Association of Southeast Asian Nations (ASEAN) - Brunei Darussalam, Singapore, and Indonesia. The visit aimed to bolster international relations and cooperation.
news.headline: ICAC Commissioner Mr Woo Ying-ming concludes successful visit to 3 ASEAN countries, enhancing regional cooperation.

news.summary: Anika Therapeutics, a global leader in osteoarthritis pain management, reported their first quarter financial results for 2025. Revenue from continuing operations was $26.2 million, a 10% decrease from the same period in 2024. Commercial Channel revenue was up 18%, driven by the Integrity Implant System and international OA Pain Management, while OEM Channel revenue decreased by 23%. Anika achieved key milestones for pipeline programs, including Hyalofast and Cingal. The company's President and CEO noted strong growth in the Commercial Channel but lower pricing affected the OEM Channel. Anika is on track to double Integrity procedures in 2025 and expects to launch Hyalofast in the U.S. in 2026. The company is also adjusting its 2025 revenue guidance to reflect lower pricing expectations. Anika's adjusted EBITDA guidance is now -3% to 3%. Additionally, the company completed a $15 million share repurchase plan and reported a cash balance of $53 million. Anika highlighted advancements in their Integrity Implant System, Hyalofast, and Cingal programs, supported by investment in regulatory and clinical efforts. MDR filing and the future European market launch for Integrity, and an NDA filing path cleared for Cingal, were significant achievements. Anika's global operations are headquartered in Massachusetts.
news.headline: Anika Therapeutics reported Q1 2025 revenue of $26.2 million, a 10% decrease. Commercial Channel revenue saw an 18% increase to $11.3 million while OEM Channel revenue decreased by 23% to $14.9 million. Adjusted EBITDA for the quarter was $0.1 million. Key milestones achieved for Hyalofast, Cingal, and Integrity systems. Intends to double Integrity procedures in 2025. Operating expenses decreased by 12% in the quarter. Share repurchase plan of $15 million completed in March. Cash balance stands at $53.4 million. Updated 2025 revenue guidance: Commercial Channel expected to be $47-$49.5 million, up 12%-18% YOY, OEM Channel forecasted at $62-$65 million, down 16%-20% YOY. Adjusted EBITDA guidance adjusted to -3% to 3%. Discontinued operations of Arthrosurface and Parcus Medical noted. Company heartened by strong growth and investments in regulatory and clinical efforts for future market success.

news.summary: Ubiquiti Inc. (NYSE: UI) shared its financial outcomes for the third quarter ending on March 31, 2025, recording revenues totaling $664.2 million. The GAAP diluted EPS stood at $2.98, while the Non-GAAP diluted EPS was $3.00. The Company's Board of Directors declared a $0.60 per share cash dividend scheduled for payment on May 27, 2025, to shareholders of record as of May 19, 2025.
news.headline: Ubiquiti Inc. reports $664.2 million in revenues and $3.00 Non-GAAP diluted EPS in Q3 Fiscal 2025. Plans $0.60/share dividend.

news.summary: National HealthCare Corporation (NYSE American: NHC), the nation's oldest publicly traded senior health care company, reported net operating revenues of $373,697,000 for the quarter ending March 31, 2025. This marks a notable 25.7% increase from the $297,176,000 in revenues during the same period in 2024. The rise in revenues was primarily driven by an 8.5% increase in same-facility net operating revenues in the first quarter of 2025 when compared to the first quarter of 2024.
news.headline: National HealthCare Corporation reports $373.7 million in Q1 2025 revenues, up 25.7% from Q1 2024.

news.summary: The recent surge in Ether, up 20% in the past 24 hours, was driven by the launch of the Pectra upgrade, with its price currently at $2,230. This surge caught traders offside, with around $2.06 billion in long positions at risk of liquidation if Ether falls back to $2,000, while $328 million in short positions were liquidated. Ether had faced uncertain sentiment in 2025 but has seen a 52% increase in the past 30 days. The rally coincides with Bitcoin gaining 3.59% in the same period. Factors contributing to Ether's surge include the Pectra hard fork, the US trade deal with the UK, and Coinbase's acquisition of Deribit for $2.9 billion. The overall crypto market saw a surge of 4.95% in the same timeframe, with the Crypto Fear & Greed Index moving further into "Greed" territory. Magazine reports indicated positive trends for AI technology in the financial sector. Note: This article does not offer investment advice, and readers are advised to conduct their research.
news.headline: Ether soared 20% after Pectra launch, hitting $2,230 with $2.06B in long positions at risk of liquidation; Ether surged, 19.6% in 24 hours; while $328 million in short positions were liquidated; Ether has faced tough sentiment this year and is up 52% in the last 30 days; current rally coincides with Bitcoin reaching over $100,000 for the first time in three months; market saw an overall 4.95% surge in 24 hours with sentiment moving into "Greed" territory.

news.summary: Compelling clinical data endorses the effectiveness of the Suprachoroidal Platform in enhancing the standard of care for treating various macular diseases. This groundbreaking technology showcases significant improvement in patients with multiple macular diseases, with promising results reported. Researchers highlight the platform's potential in revolutionizing treatment approaches, with a notable reduction in symptoms and improved outcomes observed in X% of cases. This innovative solution is poised to set a new benchmark in the medical field for managing macular diseases.
news.headline: Clearside Biomedical presents data at ARVO meeting on Suprachoroidal Platform for macular diseases treatment, featuring six presentations.

news.summary: Rockwell Automation, Inc. (NYSE: ROK) will have its Chairman and CEO, Blake Moret, along with SVP and CFO, Christian Rothe, speaking at Wolfe’s 18th Annual Global Transportation & Industrials Conference on May 21, 2025, in New York. The webcast of their fireside chat is scheduled to start at around 9:10 a.m. EDT and can be accessed on the Rockwell Automation Investor Relations website at www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/investors.html. Rockwell Automation is a well-known company in the industrial sector.
news.headline: Rockwell Automation (NYSE: ROK) to present at Wolfe’s 18th Annual Global Transportation & Industrials Conference on May 21, 2025 in New York. Fireside chat webcast at 9:10am EDT. Visit www.rockwellautomation.com/en-us/investors.html.
